name: cards-against-ai-mcp-node
description: MCP server that exposes the Cards Against AI widget.

scripts.build:check: cd .. && pnpm run build -- --target cards-against-ai && npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p cards_against_ai_server_node/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.dev: cd .. && pnpm run build -- --target cards-against-ai && cd cards_against_ai_server_node && tsx src/server.ts
scripts.start: cd .. && pnpm run build -- --target cards-against-ai && cd cards_against_ai_server_node && tsx src/server.ts
